text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of a computer or machine to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning from experience, understanding language, and making decisions. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve at tasks by analysing data instead of following explicit instructions. Deep learning is a more advanced type of machine learning, using complex networks to process information in a way similar to the human brain. AI is already all around us. For example, your phone uses AI for voice assistants like Siri, and streaming services recommend movies based on your viewing history. It also powers self-driving cars and helps doctors diagnose diseases.
